case_title: JESSICA FEENEY et al VS. MCGUIRE FAMILY PROPERTIES LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-04-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY MCGUIRE FAMILY PROPERTIES LLC FEENEY, JESSICA LOREGA, VER RYAN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT FEENEY, JESSICA LOREGA, VER RYAN TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT MCGUIRE FAMILY PROPERTIES LLC STATUTORY LAW, CASE LAW AND INTERPRETIVE ANALYSIS OF LAW HOLD THAT A NEW TENANCY AGREEMENT WITH NEW TENANTS TERMINATES AN "EXISTING TENANCY." Off Calendar Jan-05-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:42am
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, McGuire Family Properties appears through Bernard McGuire. Respondents, Jessica Feeney Ver Ryan Larega appear in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jungreis.
